differential_diagnoses: Portal hypertensive biliopathy with associated variceal hemorrhage
Portal vein thrombosis with portal hypertension
Angiodysplasia or vascular malformations in the small bowel
next_steps: Diagnostic and therapeutic mesenteric angiography with possible portal venography
Double-balloon enteroscopy to visualize the biliary-enteric anastomosis
Multidisciplinary review by interventional radiology, hepatology, and surgical oncology
Coagulation profile optimization and ongoing hematologic support
Evaluation for portal vein recanalization or TIPS if portal hypertension is confirmed as the source
